title: calea subcordata
intro: Calea subcordata, also known as Mexican Damiana or Damiana, is a plant species native to Mexico and parts of Central America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and adaptogenic effects. The health benefits of Calea subcordata include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as improved cognitive function and libido. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk remedies to promote overall well-being.
